issue_title: [Bug] Hermes Agent gateway shows offline even when running — 2 bugs in Hermes integration
issue_body_preview:
## Describe the Bug

Mission Control shows \"Hermes Agent: Gateway offline\" in Settings → Agent Runtimes even when the Hermes gateway is actively running. The Mission Control hook for Hermes is also non-functional — Hermes never delivers events to MC because the handler function has the wrong name.
test_description_zh: 打开 Mission Control 应用，进入 Settings → Agent Runtimes 页面，确保 Hermes Agent 网关已正常启动运行，观察页面中 Hermes Agent 的网关连接状态显示。
expected_result_zh: 当 Hermes Agent 网关正在运行时，Settings → Agent Runtimes 页面中应正确显示 Hermes Agent 网关为在线/已连接状态，而非显示 'Gateway offline'。同时 Hermes 应能正常向 Mission Control 传递事件，相关交互和状态更新正常工作。
